title: Autumn Picnic GUI Resource pack
description: Grab your picnic basket and blanket and get in the Autumn mood with this Autumn Picnic GUI Resource Pack for 1.20.1
body:
Grab your picnic basket and blanket and get in the Autumn mood with this Autumn Picnic GUI Resource Pack for 1.20.1

This includes GUIs for vanilla interfaces, along with Cosmetic Armor and Curios for those mod-minded players.

This pack is not for redistribution and is not to be used to train A/I
